message:
🐛 Add auto-reconnect with exponential backoff to SSE streams (#2720)

SSE fetch streams silently fail when the backend restarts or the network
drops, leaving the UI with stale data until the next polling interval.

Add retry logic inside fetchSSE with exponential backoff (1s base, 30s
cap, up to 5 attempts). On connection errors with no accumulated data,
the client now automatically retries instead of immediately rejecting.
Reconnect timers are cleaned up on abort/unmount to prevent leaks.

Fixes #2654

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
